description: Construct a new surge control building to house two (2) bladder tanks as per plans. This project will address water hammer in the water distribution system. This building is part of a larger project with additional work at the Carrollton Water Treatment Plant. The building will house water distribution equipment for the Sewerage and Water Board of New Orleans.

Structural exterior repair for condominiums front and side porch. Scope includes repairing 1st and 2nd floor porch, remove existing siding and construct new to meet code. Installation of new porch boards, and provide gas for new gas laterns. No interior work to be done. Includes electrical. No plumbing.

New construction of a 1-story approximately 1,500 sq ft water distribution equipment building as per plans. The VFD Building will house equipment to run the pumps for the Claiborne Avenue Pump Station. This project will address water hammer in the water distribution system. This building is part of a larger project with additional work at the Carrollton Water Treatment Plant and an off site location (Stroelitz). The building will house equipment required for the water distribution system for the SWBNO. The site currently holds generators and equipment that are to be moved.

Addition to the Claiborne Avenue Pump Station consisting of wall penetrations, grating, pipe supports, and equipment pads. Piping and equipment will be replaced along with electrical. This project will address water hammer in the water distribution system. This building is part of a larger project with additional work at the Carrollton Water Treatment Plant and an off site location (Stroelitz).
